name: ssr-website-auth-astro-template
description: Open-source Astro SSR website template with Supabase authentication and AWS deployment infrastructure.

scripts.prepare:aws: rm -rf ssr_dist && mkdir -p ssr_dist/dist && cp -r dist/server ssr_dist/dist/ && cp ssr/lambda.js ssr_dist && cp ssr/package.json ssr_dist && cp ssr/test.js ssr_dist
scripts.test:ssr: pnpm run build && pnpm run prepare:aws && cp ssr/lambda-local.js ssr_dist && cd ssr_dist && node test.js
